title: Notification No.124/2013-Cus(NT),dt. 11.12.2013
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No.124/2013-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 11th December, 2013 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad, Custom House, Near All India Radio, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad -380009 to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) The Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad, Custom House, Near All India Radio Navrangpura, Ahmedabad-380009; (ii) The Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Mundra, Custom House, Port User Building, Mundra Port and SEZ, Mundra; (iii) The Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Kandla, Customs House, Near Balalji Temple, Kandla-370210; (iv) The Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs (Export), Nhava Sheva, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Post- Uran, Dist: Raigad, Maharashtra; (v) The Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Nhava Sheva, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva , Post- Uran, Dist: Raigad, Maharashtra; (vi) The Deputy/Assistant Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Sabarmati, ICD- Khodiyar, S.G. Highway, Jamiyatpura Village, Dist: Ghandhinagar, Ahmedabad.; and (vii)The Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs, Central Excise, Customs and Service Tax, Hyderabad-II. Office office of the Commissioner of Central Excise, Customs and Service Tax, L.B.Stadium Road, Basheer Bagh, Hyderabad-500004, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Roop Dyes and Intermediates,65/P3, Phase-I, GIDC Estate, Wadhwan, Guajarat- 363035 and others issued vide, SCN F.No.DRI/INQ-53/2013 dated the 24th June, 2013 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad- 380007. -- 1 of 2 -- [F.No. 437/65/2013-Cus.IV] (M.V. Vasudevan) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 2 of 2 --
